title: Mapping the Grand Canyon’s Hidden Water
description: NAU researchers are using lidar and cave mapping to trace how snowmelt travels through underground systems to sustain vital springs in the Grand Canyon.
imageAlt: Mapping the Grand Canyon's Hidden Water
impact: Radiant is pushing the boundaries of remote sensing by enabling data collection in environments where satellites and traditional drones fail. Through autonomous navigation and advanced sensing, Radiant is unlocking new visibility in complex terrains—improving wildfire response, environmental monitoring, and mission-critical decision-making.
